weekOf: April 9th to April 16th (Not live until ~5am EDT on April 9th)
introMessages: The Neighborhood Watch Event enters its second week in GTA Online.
Get behind the wheel of the new Bravado Buffalo STX Pursuit, available to all from Warstock Cache & Carry from this week.

Clean up the streets by bringing Standard and Most Wanted Bounty Targets into your Bail Office for Double Rewards, or 4X if you’re a GTA+ Member. There’s also bonuses on the Pursuit Race Series, the Community Combat Series, and more.
Then, get ready for two weeks of hallucinatory hijinks sponsored by LD Organics coinciding with 420 — including a special in-game outfit for Rockstar Propaganda email list subscribers.
prizeRideChallenge: Place Top 5 in the LS Car Meet Series for 3 days in a row
weeklyChallenge: Secure 2 Bail Office Bounties to receive the Winter LSPD Officer Outfit and GTA$100,000
bonuses: 3X GTA$, RP, and LS Car Meet Rep - Pursuit Race Series
2X GTA$ and RP - Dispatch Work (3X for GTA+ Members)
2X GTA$ and RP - Bail Office Bounties (4X for GTA+ Members)
2X GTA$ and RP - The Vespucci Job (Remix)
2X GTA$ and RP - Community Combat Series
discounts: 40% Off: Bail Office Upgrades and Modifications
gunVanDiscounts: Free for GTA+ Members: Stun Gun
40% off for GTA+ Members: Heavy Rifle
70% off for GTA+ Members: Body Armor
